seed_note: Provider/adapter exposes no model seed (LlmRequest has no seed field; DeepSeek chat/completions documents none). seed=null is recorded for every call; temperature/top_p/max_output_tokens/timeout are held identical across groups; reproducibility is not faked. The SEED constant only drives blind-token generation and call-order shuffling.

groups.F9: Writer v9 Sacrificial Preflight Fusion v9 (xml_story)

execution_model: scene-level parallelism (4 concurrent scenes, each with its own isolated SQLite copy); writers sequential within a scene; NO Planner calls — frozen Planner reused from SACRIFICIAL_PREFLIGHT_FEASIBILITY_V1
rules: ZERO Planner calls; frozen Planner outputs reused.
2 groups x 3 replicas per scene; stratified-random P7/F9 call order per replica.
No Critic/Reviser/Judge. No retry. No filtering. All failures preserved.
Both groups: xml_story mode; generation_service extracts <story>; raw_response preserved.
xml_story parse failure: error_code recorded; no LLM repair.
seed=null for every model call; other parameters held identical.
max_output_tokens=6000 is an experiment-level override for BOTH groups.
The ONLY delta between P7 and F9 is the Writer prompt version.

format_and_mechanism.A1: F9 at least 11/12 successfully extract story
format_and_mechanism.A4: F9 at least 10/12 contain 8-section draft_notes structure
format_and_mechanism.A5: F9 at least 9/12 contain 6-9 narrative units in section 7

length.B3: F9 mean story chars >= P7 mean by 25%
length.B4: In pairs where P7 < 2000, F9 crosses 2000 in at least 2/3
length.B5: F9 at least 8/12 reach 2000 chars (anti-mean-skew floor)

quality.C7: F9 does not lose 0:3 in any single scene

zhuque.D1: F9 char-weighted human rate not < P7 by >5pp
zhuque.D2: F9 per-article human rate median not < P7 by >5pp
zhuque.D4: F9 human-rate >= 60% count not < P7 by >= 2

overall_judgment.STRONG_PASS: All A + B + C + D strong signal
overall_judgment.PASS: All A + B + C + D non-inferior
overall_judgment.PARTIAL: A + B passed, C or D not yet
overall_judgment.FAIL: Major shortfall in length, quality, or Zhuque
